text: I need to re-check the filter — "consider only issues that at least one PR claims to close" means I need ALL PRs (any state), not just merged ones.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
(def all-prs (github__list_pull_requests))
(def any-claim (set (filter identity (map :closes_linear all-prs))))
(def merged-claim (set (filter identity (map :closes_linear merged-prs))))
(->> done-issues
     (filter (fn [i] (contains? any-claim (:id i))))
     (filter (fn [i] (not (contains? merged-claim (:id i)))))
     (map :id))
"}
